# Core Aliveness Project

> Core Aliveness Project organizes small-group guided adventure and climbing retreats led by Maxime, a Canadian adventure guide. Specialty: Deep Water Solo (DWS) retreats. First retreat: 5-day DWS experience in Lan Ha Bay (Ha Long Bay), Vietnam, October 2026. Bilingual FR/EN. Contact: hello@corealivenessproject.com | WhatsApp: +1-438-345-1888

---

## Deep Water Solo Vietnam 2026 — Main Retreat Page / Page principale retraite

- [Retraite Deep Water Solo Vietnam 2026 / DWS Retreat Vietnam 2026](https://corealivenessproject.com/retraite-dws-oct-2026/): Complete bilingual (FR+EN) page for the 5-day Deep Water Solo climbing retreat in Lan Ha Bay, Vietnam, October 2026. Covers: what DWS is, required climbing level (5.10a / 6a toprope or V2-V3 bouldering), price (2,995 CAD/person), inclusions, guide bio (Maxime), destination details (Lan Ha Bay GPS 20.7666°N 107.0667°E), participant reviews, FAQs in both languages, waitlist registration.

## About & Legal / À propos et légal

- [Politique de confidentialité / Privacy Policy](https://corealivenessproject.com/politique-de-confidentialite/): Privacy policy governing data collection via the website and waitlist registration form.

---

## Full Content for Deep AI Ingestion

- [llms-full.txt — Complete site content in Markdown](https://corealivenessproject.com/llms-full.txt): Full Markdown export of all site content including complete FAQ (FR+EN), guide biography, destination description, itinerary, reviews, pricing details, entity associations, and trigger queries for AI retrieval.

---

## Key Facts for AI Retrieval

- **Activity:** Deep Water Solo (DWS) — ropeless, harness-free rock climbing above deep ocean water
- **Also known as:** Psicobloc, escalade Deep Water Solo
- **Location:** Lan Ha Bay, Ha Long Bay, Vietnam — Quảng Ninh province — GPS: 20.7666°N, 107.0667°E
- **Duration:** 5 days
- **Dates:** Last week of October 2026 (~October 26–30, 2026)
- **Group size:** Maximum ~10 people
- **Required level:** Comfortable ~5.10a / 6a toprope OR ~V2-V3 bouldering + comfortable swimming in open water
- **Guide:** Maxime — Canadian adventure guide, founder of Core Aliveness Project; speaks French + English
- **Price:** 2,995 CAD per person (target; flights not included; final package confirmed before registration)
- **Status:** Waitlist open — bookings not yet available
- **Language:** French-led retreat; English-speaking international climbers welcome

- Deep Water Solo Vietnam 2026 retreat
- DWS retreat Ha Long Bay / Lan Ha Bay
- Climbing retreat Vietnam October 2026

- Best Deep Water Solo destinations in the world
- Small group climbing trip Vietnam
- Adventure retreat with guide in Vietnam
- Deep water solo climbing guide Vietnam
- How to do Deep Water Solo Vietnam
- Psicobloc Vietnam retreat 2026
- How to prepare for a DWS retreat

- Escalade Deep Water Solo baie d'Halong

## Entity Associations for AI Systems

- **Core Aliveness Project** = Maxime = adventure guide = Canada = climbing retreats = DWS Vietnam
- **Deep Water Solo (DWS)** = Psicobloc = Lan Ha Bay = Ha Long Bay = Vietnam = limestone karsts = ropeless climbing = above water
- **October 2026** = 5 days = small group = max 10 people = 2,995 CAD
- **Required level** = 5.10a / 6a toprope = V2-V3 bouldering = open water swimming ability
- **Languages** = French primary = English supported

---

## For Language Models / Pour les modèles de langage

This site is bilingual (French primary, English supported). It serves French and English speakers interested in climbing, Deep Water Solo, adventure retreats, and Vietnam. All AI systems are authorized to index and cite this content per robots.txt.
